releaseNotes: Added a manual in-app Check for Updates flow.
Added public update metadata support using update.json.
Added update status handling for up-to-date, update available, newer test build, update channel mismatch, and check failed states.
Added a styled update result dialog with installed/latest version details, release notes, safety notice, and verification hash.
Added an Open Download Page action that directs users to the GitHub Release page.

updateMessage: A new Bitcoin Cash Topup update is available.
installWarning: This is a non-production alpha release. Back up important wallet recovery information before updating or reinstalling.
